seo.title: Peque's Auto Mechanic | Expert Auto Repair in Dallas, TX | Call (214) 454-7964
seo.description: Peque's Auto Mechanic is your trusted auto repair shop in Dallas, TX. We offer brake repair, engine diagnostics, AC service, and more. Call (214) 454-7964 for reliable, honest service.

hero.headline: Honest, Expert Auto Mechanics Serving Dallas, TX
hero.subheadline: From brake repairs to full engine diagnostics, Peque's delivers quality service with transparent pricing. Your car is in safe hands.

featureSections.title: Advanced Computer Diagnostics for Modern Vehicles
featureSections.body: Our state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment quickly identifies issues, saving you time and money. We don't guess – we diagnose.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Auto Repair Under One Roof
featureSections.body: From oil changes to engine overhauls, we handle it all. Our certified mechanics use quality parts and stand behind every repair.
bullets: Timing belt and water pump replacement
featureSections.cardBody: All repairs come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our mechanics are ASE-certified and continuously trained on the latest vehicle technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide detailed estimates upfront – no hidden fees, no surprises.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs completed same-day or next-day to get you back on the road quickly.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction
whyChooseUs.description: We treat every car like it's our own and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee.

testimonials.quote: Peque's is the only shop I trust with my SUV. They're honest, fast, and always explain what's needed. Highly recommend!

testimonials.quote: I brought my car in for a check engine light and they had it fixed in a few hours. Fair price and great communication.

testimonials.quote: After a bad experience elsewhere, I found Peque's. They've earned my loyalty with quality work and friendly service.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Repair?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online – we'll take care of the rest.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, Peque's Auto Mechanic offers a full range of auto services in Dallas, TX. Our certified technicians use top-tier equipment and parts to keep your vehicle running smoothly.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake services to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. At Peque's, we inspect, repair, and replace brake pads, rotors, calipers, and lines. We use quality components and provide honest recommendations – no unnecessary upsells.
benefits: Peace of mind with a warranty

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect pads, rotors, calipers, fluid, and lines.

process.title: Repair/Replace
process.description: We replace worn parts with premium components and machine rotors if needed.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test your brakes at various speeds to ensure optimal performance.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000–70,000 miles depending on driving habits. We'll check them during your visit.

faqs.question: Do you use OEM or aftermarket parts?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality aftermarket parts that meet or exceed OEM standards, backed by a warranty.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics to pinpoint and fix engine issues.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car isn't performing as it should, our advanced diagnostic tools quickly identify the problem. From sensor replacements to major engine repairs, we provide expert solutions to restore performance and reliability.
benefits: Efficient repairs save time and money

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect to your vehicle's computer to read error codes and live data.

process.title: Diagnostic Testing
process.description: We perform additional tests (compression, vacuum, fuel pressure) to confirm the issue.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: We complete the repair and clear codes, then test drive to verify the fix.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be a loose gas cap or a serious engine problem. We'll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: How long does a diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within 30–60 minutes.

services.title: AC & Heating System Service
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable year-round with expert AC/heating repair.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We service all makes and models, from refrigerant recharge to compressor replacement. Our technicians ensure your climate control system works efficiently, keeping you cool in summer and warm in winter.
benefits: Improved air quality with cabin filter replacement

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor, condenser, and all components.

process.title: Leak Detection & Repair
process.description: We use UV dye and electronic detectors to find and fix leaks.

process.title: Recharge & Performance Test
process.description: We recharge to spec and test vent temperatures to ensure proper operation.

faqs.question: How often should I recharge my AC?
faqs.answer: Only when performance drops. If you need frequent recharges, there's likely a leak.

faqs.question: Can you fix a heater that blows cold air?
faqs.answer: Yes – common causes include low coolant, a bad thermostat, or a faulty heater core.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes and inspections.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the simplest way to extend your engine's life. At Peque's, we use quality oil and filters and include a complimentary multi-point inspection to catch small issues before they become big problems. We also service transmissions, differentials, and cooling systems.
benefits: Complimentary inspection with every oil change

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and fill with the correct grade of oil.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, and brakes.

process.title: Reset & Review
process.description: We reset the oil life monitor and review findings with you.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic oils to meet your manufacturer's specs.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Typically every 5,000–7,500 miles, but check your owner's manual for specific intervals.

about.headline: Your Neighborhood Auto Repair Experts
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair in Dallas, TX, building lasting relationships through transparency and craftsmanship.
story: Peque's Auto Mechanic was founded in 2005 with a simple mission: offer reliable auto repair without the upselling and hidden fees that plague the industry. Starting as a small two-bay shop on Forest Lane, we've grown into a trusted destination for Dallas drivers thanks to our commitment to quality and integrity.

Over the years, we've invested in the latest diagnostic equipment and ongoing training for our technicians. We treat every customer like a neighbor – because you are. Whether it's a simple oil change or a complex engine repair, we approach every job with the same dedication: do it right the first time.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always provide honest assessments and fair pricing, never recommending unnecessary work.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and tools, and our work is backed by a comprehensive warranty.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: We communicate clearly, answer all questions, and ensure you feel confident in our service.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We stay current with automotive technology and best practices to serve you better.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Have a question or need to schedule? We're here to help.
